title: ARVO Clear Packing Tape 3 Rolls with Low Noise (48mm x 60m) - Durable Parcel Sealing Tape for Packing Boxes, Secure Packaging for Moving House
features: Good Adhesive Strength: Our Clear packing tape ensures parcels stay securely sealed during transit, providing a reliable hold on various surfaces for dependable packaging.

Temperature and Water Resistant: Our Clear tape performs well in various temperature conditions, from cold to hot climates, and offers water resistance to protect packages from moisture damage during transit.
50 Micron Thickness: With a robust 50-micron thickness, this tape is durable enough to secure packages without being too bulky, ensuring a professional and neat appearance.
Dimensions: Each roll measures 48mm in width and 60m in length, providing ample tape for multiple uses.
Easy to Use: Compatible with standard tape dispensers, our packaging tape is easy to apply and cut, ensuring a hassle-free sealing process for your parcels and boxes.
Multi-Purpose Application: Perfect for wrapping, moving and shipping, this versatile Clear tape meets all your packing needs, whether for home, office, or commercial use.

Flexible Value Pack Options: Choose from 3-pack, 6-pack, or 12-pack bundles, offering a budget-friendly solution for all your packing needs. Whether you’re moving house or shipping goods, there's a perfect pack size for you.

Convenient Storage: Keep your tape in optimal condition by storing unused rolls indoors, away from sunlight and moisture. The brown colour gives your packages a professional and eye-catching appearance upon delivery.
description: Product Description 50 microns thickness Helps in good holding and sealing Unused tapes must be stored indoors, away from sunlight and wet conditions for better longevity Fragile Packing Tape Packing Tape Packing Tape Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 65 4.3 out of 5 stars 49 4.4 out of 5 stars 97 Pack 5 Pack 6 Pack 12 Pack
